codeReview.summary: Commit updates gate-core test inclusion (`OrderFulfillmentE2ETest`, `CR_SalesDispatchInvoiceAccounting`), hardens `guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh` to enforce canonical dispatch posting constraints, and updates API artifacts to stop advertising legacy orchestrator dispatch posting routes. Validation evidence includes compile, gate-fast, gate-core, guard script, and changed-files coverage passing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation skills should explicitly document that targeted JaCoCo runs are acceptable evidence when repository-wide JaCoCo is pre-existing red outside the feature scope.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker session 52255d9d-48a3-4eba-b992-ca0fd242ce01 recorded `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=false` failing in unrelated existing suites, then produced successful targeted JaCoCo plus `changed_files_coverage.py` evidence at 100%/100%.

summary: Pass: gate-core and canonical-path guard hardening meet milestone requirements; coverage evidence is sufficient for changed files despite unrelated full-suite JaCoCo baseline failures.
